dataset_name: Arabidopsis recombinant tetrads and doubled haploids
sample_structure: 13 complete Col/Ler qrt1 male meiotic tetrads represented by 52 tetrad offspring; 10 doubled-haploid products; Col, Ler, and Cvi parental genomes; each complete tetrad contains all four products of one meiosis
minimum_design_unit: one complete four-product tetrad with both parental genotypes and callable Col/Ler-informative markers
size_or_scale: 65 sequenced genomes total; five tetrads (20 offspring) at mean 54x and eight tetrads (32 offspring) at mean 14x; 10 doubled haploids plus 3 parents; approximately 120 Mb haploid nuclear genome
reference_and_annotation: TAIR10/Col-0 GCF_000001735.4; TAIR10.1/NCBI RefSeq annotation on GCF_000001735.4; parental Col/Ler/Cvi genotypes must be reconstructed from exact study runs and bound to checksums
license_or_reuse_terms: ENA public study; EMBL-EBI terms of use and publication citation apply; public access does not transfer third-party rights
callable_input_contract: per-tetrad intersection of uniquely mappable, copy-normal, adequately covered parental-informative marker intervals across all four products; exclude Cvi receptor contribution, structural rearrangements, repeats, segregation errors, and marker deserts with reason codes
limitations_and_activation_rule: Executable direct pilot, but only 13 meioses: event and tract summaries are pilot estimates; GC-transmission distortion is reported with exact uncertainty and is not claim-grade unless the predeclared informative-conversion threshold is met; no transfer to vertebrate rates

sample_structure: three-generation 17-member pedigree: NA12889, NA12890, NA12891, NA12892 grandparents; NA12877 and NA12878 parents; NA12879, NA12880, NA12881, NA12882, NA12883, NA12884, NA12885, NA12886, NA12887, NA12888, and NA12893 offspring; 11 full siblings yield 22 parental transmissions, with four additional grandparent-to-parent transmissions if all members pass
minimum_design_unit: one offspring with both parents and transmitted parental haplotypes; claim-grade direct rate requires at least 50 independent callable meioses, so this pedigree is sensitivity/benchmark scale
size_or_scale: 17 genomes at approximately 50x HiSeq 2000; NA12877 and NA12878 also approximately 200x; 26 potential pedigree transmissions before QC
reference_and_annotation: GRCh38 GCA_000001405.15; GENCODE/RefSeq annotation version must be frozen with the run; public Platinum phased variant and inheritance resources must be checksum-bound
license_or_reuse_terms: Platinum resources are stated to be freely available and require manuscript citation; complete raw study phs001224 is dbGaP-governed, while PRJEB3381/PRJEB3246 and released callsets are public; access and consent scope must be audited before activation
callable_input_contract: intersection of high-confidence callable intervals in child and both parents, inheritance-vector certainty, unique diploid mapping, genotype quality, copy number two, and no Mendelian conflict; phase switches and de novo mutations are separate classes
limitations_and_activation_rule: Activate only if D01 fails identity/callability or a human sensitivity is separately desired and access is authorized; short reads poorly resolve very short NCO tracts, cell-line artifacts require filters, and the family is not a population sample

taxon_or_clade: Homo sapiens, same-population YRI primary stratum
sample_structure: 3,202 genomes at targeted 30x including the original 2,504 Phase-3 individuals and additional trio-completing samples; primary design retains unrelated YRI individuals from the frozen pedigree/population file and analyzes other populations only as replicated strata
minimum_design_unit: at least 50 unrelated diploid individuals from one sampling population after kinship, ancestry, missingness, and coverage QC; target YRI n is frozen from the exact release metadata before genotype access
size_or_scale: 3,202 whole genomes at approximately 30x; core Phase-3 panel n=2,504 across 26 populations; expanded cohort includes 602 trios
reference_and_annotation: GRCh38 GCA_000001405.15; exact joint-call release, mask, ancestral-allele source, and GENCODE/RefSeq version must be frozen; Pan troglodytes and Gorilla assemblies used for polarization must be exact-versioned in an acquisition amendment
license_or_reuse_terms: 1000 Genomes/IGSR data are public without access or use restriction under the project data-use framework; acknowledge participants and project; verify current index license and consent metadata
callable_input_contract: autosomal biallelic SNVs jointly callable in at least 95% of retained individuals, copy number two, outside low-mappability/SD/selection masks for the neutral primary; retain genotype likelihood sensitivity and context-specific monomorphic opportunities
limitations_and_activation_rule: Design only in this graph; population B is model-dependent, admixture/structure and linked selection are major confounders, and no value may be inferred from VGP H1/H2 pairs

sample_structure: 1,135 natural inbred accessions with published group/geography metadata; analysis must choose a preregistered local group with at least 50 unrelated/non-clonal accessions and exclude global pooling
minimum_design_unit: at least 50 non-clonal accessions within one locality/genetic group after relatedness and missingness QC
size_or_scale: 1,135 accessions/experiments; approximately 120 Mb haploid nuclear genome per line; combined whole-genome VCF available
reference_and_annotation: TAIR10/Col-0 GCF_000001735.4 and TAIR10.1 annotation; Arabidopsis lyrata plus a second Brassicaceae outgroup must be exact-versioned before polarization
license_or_reuse_terms: Public project and stock-center resource; repository terms and consortium citation apply; accession-specific restrictions must be checked before activation
callable_input_contract: accession-by-site callability, inbreeding-aware haploidized likelihoods, copy-normal unique sequence, context-specific invariant opportunities, and local-group structure covariates
limitations_and_activation_rule: Activate only under a separate population task; selfing, residual clonality, geographic structure, and reference bias require a species-specific demographic model, so it is not a plug-in replicate of human B

sample_structure: one primary VGP focal assembly, two close ingroup assemblies, and two distinct outgroup species; one assembly/individual per species; species-tree and topology sensitivity required
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 ingroup taxa plus 2 outgroup taxa with orthologous callable bases; each claimed focal branch needs both outgroups to agree or be handled by a polarization-error mixture
size_or_scale: Spinachia 407541755 bp/278 contigs; Pungitius 480434100 bp/912; Gasterosteus 511138727 bp/460; S. acus 359199823 bp/345; S. typhle 368283750 bp/229
reference_and_annotation: Spinachia GCA_048126635.1-GB_2025_08_04; Pungitius GCF_949316345.1-RS_2024_01; Gasterosteus GCF_964276395.1-RS_2025_12; S. acus no native annotation on exact GCA snapshot; S. typhle GCA_048301445.1-GB_2025_08_16
license_or_reuse_terms: NCBI molecular sequence data have no NCBI-imposed use restriction, but submitter rights are not transferred; VGP/G10K publication status and attribution must be rechecked for every exact assembly
callable_input_contract: reciprocal 1:1 orthology, single-copy synteny, base/assembly masks, alignment-quality masks, context-specific WS/SW opportunity counts; fourfold analysis only where audited homologous CDS phase exists in all required taxa
limitations_and_activation_rule: Primary executable phylogenetic pilot; semi-complete assemblies are admissible only through callable denominators; topology discordance, ancestral polymorphism, and annotation missingness are explicit sensitivities

sample_structure: five distinct falcon species; F. naumanni is the frozen VGP focal; branch estimates use a preregistered species tree and discordant local-gene-tree sensitivity
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 ingroup taxa plus 2 outgroup taxa; every reported branch requires identifiable ancestral state under two-outgroup or explicit probabilistic polarization
size_or_scale: F. naumanni 1215702009 bp/588 contigs; F. tinnunculus 1417225294 bp/1002; F. peregrinus 1284654402 bp/728; F. cherrug 1309366964 bp/540; F. punctatus 1279260504 bp/722
reference_and_annotation: F. naumanni GCF_017639655.2-RS_2026_06; F. tinnunculus none on exact GCA snapshot; F. peregrinus none; F. cherrug GCF_023634085.1-RS_2023_04; F. punctatus GCF_963210335.1-RS_2025_09
license_or_reuse_terms: NCBI molecular sequence policy plus assembly-specific VGP/G10K publication-status audit and attribution
callable_input_contract: reciprocal 1:1 syntenic orthology, repeat/duplication/base-quality masks, per-taxon coverage, branch opportunity counts, and annotation-phase audit; sex chromosomes excluded from primary
limitations_and_activation_rule: Primary executable phylogenetic pilot; falcon introgression/ILS and heterogeneous assembly/annotation quality require topology and neutral-partition sensitivities; substitution bias is not direct conversion

sample_structure: five distinct delphinid species; Pseudorca is the VGP focal
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 ingroup plus 2 outgroups; same callable/ancestral-state gate as H01/H02
size_or_scale: Pseudorca 2674592094 bp/561 contigs; Globicephala 2651276051 bp/2076; Orcinus 2647335075 bp/570; Tursiops 2378505825 bp/1035; Delphinus 2663516986 bp/1598
license_or_reuse_terms: NCBI molecular sequence policy plus assembly-specific VGP/G10K publication-status audit and attribution
callable_input_contract: same as H01, with cetacean-specific repeat masks and chromosome-synteny audit
limitations_and_activation_rule: Ranked alternate if either primary panel fails a pre-result identity, orthology, topology, or minimum-callability gate; larger genomes make it a higher-cost alternate

sample_structure: four syngnathid species plus one stickleback root; S. typhle is the VGP alternate focal
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 ingroup plus 2 polarization paths; if a single distant root cannot resolve a branch, add a second exact outgroup before execution rather than force a state
size_or_scale: S. typhle 368283750 bp/229 contigs; S. rostellatus 378812902 bp/150; S. acus 324331233 bp/130; Hippocampus 452180031 bp/119; Pungitius 480434100 bp/912
reference_and_annotation: S. typhle GCA_048301445.1-GB_2025_08_16; S. acus GCF_901709675.1 Annotation Release 100; Pungitius GCF_949316345.1-RS_2024_01; no native annotation on exact S. rostellatus or Hippocampus snapshot
license_or_reuse_terms: NCBI molecular sequence policy plus assembly-specific VGP/G10K publication-status audit and attribution
callable_input_contract: same as H01, but the second-outgroup gate is unresolved until acquisition and therefore this panel is not executable as written
limitations_and_activation_rule: Second ranked alternate; must add and freeze a second distinct outgroup before activation, so it cannot silently replace H01/H02

dataset_name: Human Pangenome Reference Consortium Release 1 plus T2T-CHM13v2.0
sample_structure: 47 phased diploid individuals (94 haplotype assemblies) plus complete haploid CHM13 reference; analyze paralog families and segmental duplications only after haplotype-specific copy inventory and locus anchoring
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 distinguishable copies in an orthogroup and at least 5 independent diploid individuals with the same copy-state class; population-frequency claims require a larger prespecified stratum
size_or_scale: 94 phased haplotypes from 47 individuals, approximately 94 x 3.0 Gb assembled sequence; CHM13v2.0 3117292070 bp/25 contigs
reference_and_annotation: HPRC release-1 assembly annotations and pangenome graph frozen by digest; CHM13 GCA_009914755.4 / RefSeq GCF_009914755.1 and CHM13v2.0 annotation; SD track and copy-number truth inputs frozen separately
license_or_reuse_terms: HPRC Release 1 is publicly available without restriction; acknowledge participants/consortium; NCBI policy applies to CHM13; verify sample-specific consent and current release terms before activation
callable_input_contract: copy-complete haplotype assembly, unique flanking anchors, read-depth/k-mer copy validation, orthology/paralogy gene tree, allelic-haplotype separation, and exclusion of collapsed or unresolved copies
limitations_and_activation_rule: Design only; detects non-allelic copy homogenization candidates, not meiotic allelic conversion or gBGC; cell-line/assembly errors and recurrent mutation remain alternative explanations

dataset_name: Human Genome Structural Variation Consortium phase 2
sample_structure: 32 diverse diploid genomes represented by 64 haplotype-resolved long-read/Strand-seq assemblies
minimum_design_unit: at least 3 resolved copies in at least 5 independent diploid individuals sharing the copy-state class
size_or_scale: 64 assembled haplotypes from 32 individuals; BioProject reports 1.32 TB sequence and assembly data
reference_and_annotation: GRCh38 plus HGSVC phased assembly/variant release frozen by digest; assembly-specific gene/SD annotations must be generated or frozen without projecting copy identity by coordinate alone
license_or_reuse_terms: Public ENA/IGSR resource; consent, repository terms, and consortium citation apply
callable_input_contract: same copy-aware contract as N01; require Strand-seq phase consistency and long-read support at each copy boundary
limitations_and_activation_rule: Alternate only under a separately authorized non-allelic task; older assemblies incompletely resolve many high-identity SDs, so copy-resolution failure produces no call rather than a negative result
